title: Connections
description: Apps connected to your node via Nostr Wallet Connect

detail.title: Connection Details
detail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this connection?

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.superuserTitle: This app can create other app connections
permissions.superuserDesc: Make sure to set budgets on connections created by this app.

actions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this connection?

connections.title: Connections
connections.connectedAppsEmptyDesc: Connect your app of choice, fine-tune permissions and enjoy a seamless and secure wallet experience.
connections.isolatedRemoveConfirm: Are you sure you wish to remove the <1>isolated</1> status from this connection?
connections.payPermissionsConfirm: Are you sure you wish to give this connection <1>pay permissions</1>?
connections.warningNotice: ⚠️ Warning: This applies to all apps that have this connection secret. Only change this if you know it is safe to do so, otherwise you could potentially lose all funds
connections.isolatedFunds: that are deposited into this isolated app

newApp.title: Connect a New App
newApp.description: Paste a connection string or scan a QR code to connect an app to your wallet.
newApp.unsupportedMethods: This app requests methods not supported by your wallet: {{methods}}
newApp.unsupportedNotificationTypes: This app requests notification types not supported by your wallet: {{types}}
newApp.tryLdkBackend: Try the Lokihub LDK backend for extra features.
newApp.headerDescription: Configure wallet permissions for the app and follow instructions to finalize the connection
newApp.name: Name
newApp.nameDescription: Name of the app or purpose of the connection
newApp.enableAcceptingConnections: Enable accepting connections to other apps
newApp.allowAuthorizeNew: Allow this app to let you authorize new connections to your Lokihub.
newApp.canUseApp: You can now use the app with your Lokihub.
newApp.openApp: Open the app you wish to connect to
newApp.findSettings: Find settings to connect your wallet (may be under <1>Nostr Wallet Connect</1> or <2>NWC</2>).
newApp.scanOrPaste: Scan or paste the connection secret
newApp.lokiGoPermission: Loki Go will be given permission to create other app connections which can spend your balance.
newApp.warningLokiGo: Warning: Loki Go can create connections with a larger budget than the one set for Loki Go. Make sure to always set a budget.
newApp.enterUnlockPassword: Please enter your unlock password to continue.

cleanup.title: Cleanup Unused Apps
cleanup.description: Review apps that haven't been used for 2 months or longer
cleanup.warningDetail: Review the app carefully before deleting it, deleted apps cannot be recovered.
cleanup.noMore: No more unused apps to review.
cleanup.progressDetail: {{reviewed}} of {{total}} unused apps reviewed ({{skipped}} skipped, {{deleted}} deleted)

connectAppCard.title: Connect App
connectAppCard.description: Use Nostr Wallet Connect to link apps to your wallet.
connectAppCard.takingLonger: Connecting is taking longer than usual.
